text: "The System shall display the real-time online status of all users in the contact list."
"The System shall initiate a text chat window upon the user double-clicking an online contact."
"The System shall allow users to invite additional online participants to a text conversation."
"The System shall transmit local files to the conversation recipient upon the user clicking the file button."
"The System shall broadcast live audio and video streams between faculty and students."
"The System shall initiate a call to the recipient computer upon the user clicking the Audio Button."
"The System shall terminate the conversation upon the user clicking the hang up button."
"The System shall allow users to record an introductory video for their profile page."
"The System shall restrict student profile access to users enrolled in the same class."
"The System shall allow only the profile owner to modify personal information."
"The System shall allocate 1 gigabyte of storage space per student for assignment uploads."
"The System shall block file uploads that exceed the user's allocated disk space quota."
"The System shall display a file tree diagram of the user's uploaded documents."
"The System shall initiate a test timer upon the completion of a test file download."
"The System shall provide an 'Upload Test' button only for the duration of the exam timer."
"The System shall calculate the score for objective test questions immediately upon submission."
"The System shall save the user's custom layout configuration upon logout."
"The System shall display a check mark next to toolbars selected for view in the GUI."
"The System shall synchronize the host's desktop display to all participants in Whiteboard-Edu."
"The System shall lock editing tools in a shared document upon the host's command."
"The System shall provide audio lectures in the MP3 format for podcasting."
"The System shall remove content identified as inflammatory or derogatory from the portal."
"The System shall enforce a password complexity of 8 to 12 characters."
"The System shall require a password update from the user every three months."
"The System shall process 95% of user transactions in less than 1 second."
"The System must operate on a Microsoft Server 2003 platform or later."
"The System must restrict access to Internet Explorer, Firefox, and Safari browsers."
"The System must utilize IIS 6.0 and the.Net Framework 2.0 or later."
"The System must maintain a maximum capacity of 250 concurrent user sessions."
"The System must require users to enable JavaScript and pop-up windows."
"The User should maintain a minimum download speed of 1.5 Mbps for streaming."
"The System should notify users of scheduled maintenance 24 hours in advance."
